commentary_text: The model favors Ecuador at 57% while the market holds them at 41%, a 16-percentage-point gap on the favorite outcome. This narrowing of confidence in Ecuador's advantage, paired with the market's tilt toward the draw (32% vs. 27%), suggests sportsbooks may be pricing in information absent from the model's last update—recent lineup changes, injury news, or unexpected shifts in form from either side. The model relies on Elo ratings and historical goal patterns; the market sees real-money flows reflecting current squad status. Both sources agree Ecuador are favored, but the dashboard flags this as a genuine divergence worth monitoring before kickoff.
